spin_match_content.heading_t: Spin Match | Precision Timing & Reflex Arcade
spin_match_content.head_dec: A fast and fun arcade game where timing and color matching test your reflexes.
spin_match_content.head_con: Spin Match is a high-speed reflex arcade game where you guide a ball through spinning rings by matching colors. One wrong move ends the game instantly, making timing and focus the key to survival.
spin_match_content.obj_dec: Keep moving up through the spinning ring. Tap at the right time so your ball passes through the same color. A wrong match ends the game.
spin_match_content.setup_dec: Spin Match is simple to learn but hard to master. Your reaction speed and timing decide how far you can go.
spin_match_content.setup_list_one: Tap, click, or press Space to jump.
spin_match_content.setup_list_two: Pass through the same color as your ball.
spin_match_content.setup_list_three: Orbs change your ball color, so react quickly.
spin_match_content.setup_list_four: The game never stops and keeps getting faster.
spin_match_content.feat_list_one: See how the ring moves before jumping.
spin_match_content.feat_list_two: Quickly adjust when your color changes.
spin_match_content.feat_list_three: Jump at the right moment to pass safely.
spin_match_content.rule_list_one: Game gets faster as score increases.
spin_match_content.foot_dec: Gets harder the longer you play.

faq_section.q_one: How does the speed scaling work in Spin Match?
faq_section.ans_one: The rotation speed increases with every point you score. However, at every 5-point milestone, you will notice a significant surge in velocity, requiring much faster reaction times.
faq_section.q_two: When do the ring change rotation direction?
faq_section.ans_two: Every 10 points (10, 20, 30, etc.), the ring instantly reverse their rotation direction. This is designed to test your spatial adaptation and break repetitive timing patterns.
faq_section.q_three: How do I control the ball accurately?
faq_section.ans_three: On desktop, use the Space bar or Left Mouse Click. On mobile, simply tap the screen. Each interaction provides a consistent upward burst; timing these bursts allows you to 'hover' or move upward.
faq_section.q_four: Can I pass through any color segment of an obstacle?
faq_section.ans_four: No. You can only safely pass through segments that exactly match the current color of your ball. Touching any other color results in an immediate game over.
faq_section.q_five: What is the purpose of the multi-colored Match orbs?
faq_section.ans_five: Passing through an orb triggers a Spectrum Shift, which randomizes your ball's color. You must instantly identify your new color to navigate the next obstacle correctly.
faq_section.q_six: Is there a specific strategy for high scores?
faq_section.ans_six: The most effective strategy is the 'Observation Hover.' Instead of rushing upward, tap steadily to stay in place below an obstacle until you have analyzed its speed and direction.
faq_section.q_seven: Are there different levels to complete?
faq_section.ans_seven: Spin Match features a 'Classic Endless' mode. There are no level caps; the difficulty floor rises continuously, making the game progressively harder the longer you survive.
faq_section.q_eight: Does the gravity change as the game progresses?
faq_section.ans_eight: The gravity constant remains the same throughout the run. This allows players to build muscle memory for the jump height while only the obstacle speed and direction change.
faq_section.faq_dec: Everything you need to know about the game.

spin_match.step_one_msg: Click/Tap on the ball to jump
spin_match.step_two_msg: Match your GREEN ball with the GREEN segment
spin_match.step_three_msg: Good luck! Beat your high score
